subcodes.first_line: O ye branches of the Divine Lote-Tree of the All-Merciful! Two letters from you were received which, praise be to God, were a mighty proof of steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفروع من السدره الرحمانیه دو نامه شما رسید الحمد لله دلیل جلیل بر ثبوت و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @service to others; to the Cause of God
